content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Raypark.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Ray Park]] was born in August 1974]]

A list of events related to ''Star Wars'' in '''1974'''.

==February==
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Seth Green]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Ed McGuinness]] is born.
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Tobias Menzies]] is born.
*[[March 17|17]] – [[Ben Cooke]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 8|08]] – [[Nnedi Okorafor]] is born.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Edgar Wright]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Matt Berry]] is born.
*[[May 6|06]] – [[Matthew Yang King]] is born.
*[[May 7|07]] – [[Breckin Meyer]] is born.
*[[May 25|25]] – [[Frank Klepacki]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 7|07]] – [[Dave Filoni]] is born.
*[[June 17|17]] – [[Matthew Senreich]] is born.
*[[June 19|19]] – [[Bumper Robinson]] is born.
*[[June 22|22]] – [[Donald Faison]] is born.
*[[June 23|23]] – [[Joel Edgerton]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Gabriel Hardman]] is born.
*[[July 23|23]] – [[Orli Shoshan]] is born.
*[[July 31|31]] – [[Giancarlo Volpe]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Ray Park]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 18|18]] – [[E. Anne Convery]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 28|28]] – [[Paul Warren]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 16|16]] – [[Troy Hall]] is born.
*[[November 27|27]] – [[Alec Newman]] is born.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[James Mathis III]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 17|17]] – [[Jeffrey Goldman]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[J.J. Kirby]] is born.
*[[Chris Trevas]] is born.
*[[Dorling Kindersley]] is founded.

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''
*[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle (updated edition)|''Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle'' (updated edition)]]
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''
